steps.t: Strange runes and frenzied stone-claws can both be found in the north-western section of Máttugard. You should collect the strange runes and defeat th…
Varthmath can be found at Zidir-nesad, The Steepset, in Máttugard. You should talk to Varthmath at Zidir-nesad.
Voina can be found at Zidir-nesad, The Steepset, in Máttugard. You should give the strange runes to Voina.
Voina can be found at Zidir-nesad, The Steepset, in Máttugard. You should talk to Voina.
